debug_info.goal:
α nt : Type
G : ContextFreeGrammar α nt
u v : Word ({ x // x ∈ G.V } ⊕ { x // x ∈ G.Z })
cfd : ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation α nt G u v
h_not_same : u ≠ v
u' : Word ({ x // x ∈ G.V } ⊕ { x // x ∈ G.Z })
dstep : G.ContextFreeDerivationStep u
derivation : ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation α nt G u' v
sound : dstep.result = u'
h_exhaustive :
  ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.exhaustiveCondition α nt G u v
    (ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.step α nt G u u' v dstep derivation sound)
h_constructor_cfd : cfd = ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.step α nt G u u' v dstep derivation sound
rightSide : Word ({ x // x ∈ G.V } ⊕ { x // x ∈ G.Z }) := (↑dstep.prod).rhs
allChildren : List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len }) :=
  @ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.collectDerivationTreeNodes.match_2 α nt G u v cfd u' dstep sound
    (fun derivation h_exhaustive h_constructor_cfd => List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len }))
    derivation h_exhaustive h_constructor_cfd (fun h_same h_exhaustive h_constructor_cfd h_constructor => [])
    fun u'' dstep' derivation' sound' h_exhaustive h_constructor_cfd h_constructor =>
    have u'_comp := ⋯;
    have derivation_exhaustive :=
      ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.exhaustive_imp_child_exhaustive α nt G u v cfd h_exhaustive u' dstep
        derivation sound ⋯;
    collectDerivationTreeNodes derivation derivation_exhaustive ⋯
u_comp✝ : dstep.pre.len + (Word.mk [Sum.inl (↑dstep.prod).lhs]).len + dstep.suf.len = u.len
var_len_1 : (Word.mk [Sum.inl (↑dstep.prod).lhs]).len = 1
pre_len_less_u_len : dstep.pre.len < u.len
u_comp : dstep.pre.len + (Word.mk [Sum.inl (↑dstep.prod).lhs]).len + dstep.suf.len = u.len
suf_len_less_u_len : dstep.suf.len < u.len
leftOfVarCount : { x // x ∈ Finset.range u.len } := ⟨dstep.pre.len, ⋯⟩
rightOfVarCount : { x // x ∈ Finset.range u.len } := ⟨dstep.suf.len, ⋯⟩
rhs_symbol_count : ℕ := (↑dstep.prod).rhs.len
u'_eq_result : dstep.result = u'
n : ℕ
h_num_vars_rhs : (↑dstep.prod).rhs.len = n + 1
h_rhs_non_empty : 1 ≤ (↑dstep.prod).rhs.len
h_u_vs_u'_len : u'.len = u.len + (rhs_symbol_count - 1)
h_u_vs_u'_len₂ : u.len ≤ u'.len
u_range_subset_u'_range : Finset.range u.len ⊆ Finset.range u'.len
leftOfVarCount₂ : { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len } := ⟨↑leftOfVarCount, ⋯⟩
index₁ : { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len }
h_index_valid : ∃ location ∈ allChildren, location.2 = index₁
afunc : List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len }) →
  G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len } → List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len }) :=
  fun prev x =>
    @ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.collectDerivationTreeNodes.match_3 α nt G u'
      (fun x => List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len })) x fun DT index₂ =>
      if h_is : index₁ = index₂ then prev ++ [(DT, index₂)] else prev
afuncDef :
  afunc = fun prev x =>
    @ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.collectDerivationTreeNodes.match_3 α nt G u'
      (fun x => List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len })) x fun DT index₂ =>
      if h_is : index₁ = index₂ then prev ++ [(DT, index₂)] else prev
a : List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len }) := List.foldl afunc [] allChildren
aDef : a = List.foldl afunc [] allChildren
afunc_monotone :
  ∀ (list₁ list₂ : List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len })),
    list₁ ≠ [] → List.foldl afunc list₁ list₂ ≠ []
head : G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len }
tail : List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len })
ind_hyp : List.foldl afunc [] tail = [] ↔ ¬∃ location ∈ tail, location.2 = index₁
h_nil :
  List.foldl (fun prev x => if index₁ = x.2 then prev ++ [x] else prev) (if index₁ = head.2 then [head] else []) tail =
    []
h_isnot : ¬index₁ = head.2
⊢ ¬head.2 = index₁ ∧ ∀ (x : G.DerivationTree), (x, index₁) ∉ tail

proof:
have h_fold_nil : List.foldl (fun prev x => if index₁ = x.2 then prev ++ [x] else prev) [] tail = [] := by
                      simpa [h_isnot] using h_nil
                    have h_not_exists_tail : ¬ ∃ location ∈ tail, location.2 = index₁ := (ind_hyp.mp h_fold_nil)
                    refine And.intro ?_ ?_
                    · exact by
                        intro h
                        exact h_isnot (h.symm)
                    · intro x
                      have : ¬ ∃ location ∈ tail, location.2 = index₁ := h_not_exists_tail
                      intro hx
                      have hx' : ∃ location ∈ tail, location.2 = index₁ := by
                        refine ⟨(x, index₁), hx, rfl⟩
                      exact this hx'
failed_attempts:
refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
                    · exact h_isnot
                    · intro x
                      intro hx
                      have : (x, index₁) = head := by
                        simpa using hx
                      have : head.2 = index₁ := by
                        simpa [this]
                      exact (h_isnot this.symm).elim

refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
                    · exact h_isnot.symm
                    · intro x
                      simpa using (show (x, index₁) ∉ tail from by
                        intro hx
                        exact (ind_hyp.mp h_nil) ⟨(x, index₁), hx, rfl⟩)

refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
                    · exact h_isnot
                    · intro x
                      simpa using (fun hx : (x, index₁) ∈ tail => (ind_hyp.mp h_nil) ⟨(x, index₁), hx, rfl⟩)

refine ⟨by
                      intro h
                      exact h_isnot h.symm, ?_⟩
                    intro x
                    have : (x, index₁).2 = index₁ := rfl
                    simp [this]
x

refine ⟨by
                      intro h
                      exact h_isnot h.symm, ?_⟩
                    intro x
                    have : (x, index₁) ∉ head :: tail := by
                      intro hx
                      rcases List.mem_cons.1 hx with hx | hx
                      · cases hx
                        exact h_isnot rfl
                      · exact h_index_valid.elim (fun location hloc =>
                          (hloc.2 hx).elim)
                    intro hx
                    exact this (List.mem_cons_of_mem _ hx)

refine And.intro ?_ ?_
                    · exact h_isnot
                    · intro x
                      intro hx
                      have : (x, index₁) ∈ tail := hx
                      exact this

refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
                    · exact h_isnot
                    · intro x
                      intro hx
                      simpa [Prod.snd] using hx

refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
                    · exact h_isnot
                    · intro x
                      have : ¬ (x, index₁) ∈ tail := by
                        intro hx
                        exact (ind_hyp.mp h_nil) ⟨(x, index₁), hx, rfl⟩
                      simpa using this

refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
                    · exact h_isnot
                    · intro x
                      simp

refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
                    · exact h_isnot
                    · intro x
                      intro hx
                      simpa using hx

refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
                    · exact h_isnot
                    · intro x
                      have : (x, index₁) ∈ tail → False := by
                        intro hx
                        have : ∃ location ∈ tail, location.2 = index₁ := ⟨(x, index₁), hx, rfl⟩
                        exact (ind_hyp.mp h_nil) this
                      simpa [List.not_mem_cons] using this
.elim

refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
                    · exact h_isnot
                    · intro x
                      intro hx
                      have : (x, index₁) ∈ (head :: tail) := by
                        exact List.mem_cons_of_mem _ hx
                      have : (x, index₁) = head := by
                        simpa using (List.mem_singleton.mp this)
                      exact h_isnot (by
                        have : head.2 = index₁ := by
                          simpa [this]
                        simpa [eq_comm] using this)

refine ⟨by
                      exact h_isnot.symm, ?_⟩
                    intro x
                    have : (x, index₁) ∈ tail → False := by
                      intro hx
                      have : ∃ location ∈ tail, location.2 = index₁ := ⟨(x, index₁), hx, rfl⟩
                      exact (ind_hyp.mp (by
                        simpa [h_isnot] using h_nil)) this
                    simpa [this]

refine ⟨by
                      intro h
                      exact h_isnot h.symm, ?_⟩
                    intro x
                    intro hx
                    have : (x, index₁).2 = index₁ := rfl
                    exact ind_hyp.mp h_nil ⟨(x, index₁), hx, this⟩

constructor
                    · exact h_isnot
                    · intro x
                      simp

refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
                    · exact h_isnot
                    · intro x
                      intro hx
                      have : False := by
                        simpa using hx
                      exact this.elim
his

refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
                    · exact h_isnot.symm
                    · intro x
                      intro hx
                      have : (x, index₁) ∈ tail := by
                        simpa using hx
                      exact (ind_hyp.mp h_nil) ⟨(x, index₁), this, rfl⟩

have : ¬ head.2 = index₁ := by
                      intro h
                      exact h_isnot h.symm
                    refine And.intro this ?_
                    intro x
                    intro hx
                    exact (ind_hyp.mp h_nil) ⟨(x, index₁), hx, rfl⟩

refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
                    · exact h_isnot
                    · intro x
                      have : (x, index₁) ∉ head :: tail := by
                        simpa using (List.not_mem_of_foldl_eq_nil (l := head :: tail) (f := fun prev x => if index₁ = x.2 then prev ++ [x] else prev) (init := []) h_nil (x := (x, index₁)))
                      simpa using (List.not_mem_of_not_mem_cons this)
Confusion

refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
                    · exact h_isnot
                    · intro x
                      intro hx
                      have : (x, index₁).2 = index₁ := rfl
                      exact hx

refine ⟨by
                      exact h_isnot.symm, ?_⟩
                    intro x
                    have : (x, index₁).2 = index₁ := rfl
                    exact fun hmem =>
                      (ind_hyp.mp h_nil) ⟨(x, index₁), hmem, this⟩
successful_attempts:
have h_fold_nil : List.foldl (fun prev x => if index₁ = x.2 then prev ++ [x] else prev) [] tail = [] := by
                      simpa [h_isnot] using h_nil
                    have h_not_exists_tail : ¬ ∃ location ∈ tail, location.2 = index₁ := (ind_hyp.mp h_fold_nil)
                    refine And.intro ?_ ?_
                    · exact by
                        intro h
                        exact h_isnot (h.symm)
                    · intro x
                      have : ¬ ∃ location ∈ tail, location.2 = index₁ := h_not_exists_tail
                      intro hx
                      have hx' : ∃ location ∈ tail, location.2 = index₁ := by
                        refine ⟨(x, index₁), hx, rfl⟩
                      exact this hx'
